privileged_info_summary: The task involves assigning logical IDs to three virtual cameras in a test Nx Witness VMS environment. The cameras are named 'Parking Lot Camera', 'Entrance Camera', and 'Server Room Camera' and should be assigned logical IDs 101, 102, and 103 respectively. The Nx Witness server runs at https://localhost:7001 with default admin credentials (admin / Admin1234!). The REST API authentication uses POST /rest/v1/login/sessions to obtain a Bearer token, which is then used in the Authorization header for subsequent API calls. Device logical IDs are modified using the PATCH /rest/v1/devices/{deviceId} endpoint with request body {"logicalId": <number>}. All three cameras exist as virtual test cameras created during environment setup using the testcamera tool.
